column1: Are you a magician? Because whenever I look at you everyone else disappears.
I must be a snowflake because I have fallen for you.
Do you have a map? I just got lost in your eyes.
If you were a vegetable you would be a cute-cumber.
Are you a camera? Because every time I look at you I smile.
Do you believe in love at first sight or should I walk by again?
I would say God bless you but it looks like he already did.
Are you a parking ticket? Because you have got fine written all over you.
I am not a photographer but I can picture us together.
Do you know what my shirt is made of? Boyfriend material.
If I could rearrange the alphabet I would put U and I together.
Are you from Tennessee? Because you are the only ten I see.
I seem to have lost my phone number. Can I have yours?
Can I borrow a kiss? I promise I will give it back.
If you were a fruit you would be a fineapple.
Your hand looks heavy. Can I hold it for you?
I am not a genie but I can make your dreams come true.
If beauty were time you would be an eternity.
I must be in a museum because you truly are a work of art.
Is your name Google? Because you have everything I have been searching for.
If I were a cat I would spend all 9 lives with you.
You must be the reason for global warming because you are hot.
Are you a bank loan? Because you have my interest.
Even if there was not any gravity on earth I would still fall for you.
My doctor says I am lacking vitamin U.
You look familiar. Did we take a class together? I could swear we had chemistry.
Were you in Boy Scouts? Because you tied my heart in a knot.
Are you religious? Because you are the answer to all my prayers.
Can I follow you home? My parents always told me to follow my dreams.
I was wondering if you have an extra heart. Mine seems to have been stolen.
You are so beautiful that you made me forget my pickup line.
If looks could kill you would be a weapon of mass destruction.
I am no organ donor but I would be happy to give you my heart.
Are you a campfire? Because you are hot and I want s mores.
I would never play hide and seek with you because someone like you is impossible to find.
Do you have a Band-Aid? Because I just scraped my knee falling for you.
I hope you know CPR because you are taking my breath away.
Is it hot in here or is it just you?
Are you a time traveler? Because I can see you in my future.
You must be Jamaican because Jamaican me crazy.
If you were a burger at McDonalds you would be the McGorgeous.
Do you have a pencil? Because I want to erase your past and write our future.
Are you an interior decorator? Because when I saw you the entire room became beautiful.
Are you a tornado? Because you just blew me away.
Did you invent the airplane? Because you seem Wright for me.
Do you have a sunburn or are you always this hot?
If nothing lasts forever will you be my nothing?
I am learning about important dates in history. Wanna be one of them?
You must be a high test score because I want to take you home and show you to my mother.
Is your daddy a baker? Because you are a cutie pie.
Are you French? Because Eiffel for you.
If you were a transformer you would be Optimus Fine.
Do you play soccer? Because you are a keeper.
Are you Netflix? Because I could watch you for hours.
If you were a chicken you would be impeccable.
Can I tie your shoes? Because I do not want you falling for anyone else.
If you were a booger I would pick you first.
You must be the square root of minus one because you cannot be real.
Do you like Star Wars? Because Yoda one for me.
Are you Australian? Because you meet all of my koala-fications.
I would tell you a joke about a pizza but it is a little cheesy.
Are you a tower? Because Eiffel for you.
My love for you is like dividing by zero. It cannot be defined.
Do you have a name or can I call you mine?
If you were a library book I would check you out.
I must be a diamond because you just gave me a hardness of 10.
Is your dad an artist? Because you are a masterpiece.
Are you an alien? Because you just abducted my heart.
I am not a hoarder but I want to keep you forever.
Your eyes are like the ocean. I could get lost in them forever.
Are you a keyboard? Because you are my type.
Do you have any raisins? How about a date?
If I received a nickel for every time I saw someone as beautiful as you I would have five cents.
Are you a light switch? Because you turn me on.
You must be a broom because you just swept me off my feet.
I am not trying to impress you but I am Batman.
Did it hurt when you fell from the vending machine? Because you are a snack.
Do you have a map? I keep getting lost in your eyes.
If you were a fruit you would be a fine-apple.
Are you a Wi-Fi signal? Because I am feeling a connection.
I was wondering if you had an extra heart. Mine was just stolen.
Is your name Mickey? Because you are so fine.
Are you a cat? Because you are purrfect.
If you were a flower you would be a daaaaaamn-delion.
Do you believe in fate? Because I think we were meant to be.
You are so sweet you are giving me a toothache.
I hope you know CPR because you take my breath away.
Are you a volcano? Because I lava you.
Is your name Danuvius? Because you are an absolute gorgenis.
If I were to ask you out would your answer be the same as the answer to this question?
I seem to have misplaced my Princess crown. Can I be yours instead?
If you were a triangle you would be acute one.
Are you made of beryllium gold and titanium? Because you are Be-Au-Ti-Ful.
Are you a 90 degree angle? Because you are looking right.
Do you want to see a picture of a beautiful person? Hold up a mirror.
Did the sun come out or did you just smile at me?
Life without you would be like a broken pencil... pointless.
I could drink a whole ocean but still I would be thirsty for you.
Is your dad a terrorist? Because you are the bomb.
You must be a magician because every time I look at you everyone else disappears.
If I were a stop light I would turn red every time you passed by just so I could stare at you a bit longer.
You must be tired because you have been running through my mind all day.
Was your father a thief? Because someone stole the stars from the sky and put them in your eyes.
Are you a beaver? Because daaaaaam.
Do you live in a corn field? Because I am stalking you.
If I could reach out and hold a star for every time you have made me smile I would have the entire night sky in the palm of my hand.
Are you from Japan? Because I am trying to get in ja-pan your pants.
If I had a rose for every time I thought of you I would be walking through my garden forever.
You are so beautiful that I want to plant a tree and a truck on you.
If beauty were a grain of sand you would be a million beaches.
Is your name Waldo? Because someone like you is hard to find.
Your body is a wonderland and I want to be Alice.
If I told you that you had a great body would you hold it against me?
Can you take me to the doctor? Because I just broke my leg falling for you.
Excuse me I think you dropped something... my jaw.
You must be the speed of light because time stops when I look at you.
If I were a cat I would spend all nine lives with you.
You look a lot like my next boyfriend.
Do you like raisins? How do you feel about a date?
Kiss me if I am wrong but dinosaurs still exist right?
If you stood in front of a mirror and held up 11 roses you would see 12 of the most beautiful things in the world.
Your eyes are as blue as the ocean and baby I am lost at sea.
I want our love to be like pi... irrational and never ending.
Are you a microwave? Because mmmmmmmmm you make me hot.
Do you have a twin sister? Then you must be the most beautiful girl in the world.
Are you a cup of coffee? Because you keep me up all night.
I am no Fred Flintstone but I can make your bed rock.
Is your dad a boxer? Because you are a knockout.
Do you have a quarter? Because I want to call my mom and tell her I met the one.
If you were a steak you would be well done.
I am not actually this tall. I am sitting on my wallet.
I bet your license got suspended for driving all these guys crazy.
Can I have directions to your heart?
I am new in town. Could you give me directions to your apartment?
If you were a hamburger at McDonalds you would be a McGorgeous.
I may not be the best looking guy here but I am the only one talking to you.
Are your legs tired? Because you have been running through my mind all day.
I am fighting the urge to make you the happiest woman on earth tonight.
I cannot feel my legs. Can I feel yours?
I have had a really bad day but it always makes me feel better to see a pretty girl smile. Would you smile for me?
Are you going to kiss me or do I have to lie to my diary?
If you were a roller coaster I would ride you all day long.
I was so enchanted by your beauty that I ran into that wall over there. So I am going to need your name and number for insurance purposes.
You are like a dictionary. You add meaning to my life.
I bet you play soccer because you are a keeper.
You must be jelly because jam does not shake like that.
I am not drunk I am just intoxicated by you.
Is your name Chapstick? Because you are da balm.
I am writing a term paper on the finer things in life and I was wondering if I could interview you.
Do you have a mirror in your pocket? Because I can see myself in your pants.
You must be a hell of a thief because you stole my heart from across the room.
If beauty were sunlight you would shine from a million light-years away.
Do you work at Dickies? Because you are making my pants rise.
If I had a garden I would put your tulips and my tulips together.
Are you a candle? Because I want to blow you out.
Are you a carbon sample? Because I want to date you.
Baby you must be a broom because you just swept me off my feet.
Do you have a Band-Aid? Because I scraped my knee falling for you.
Can I follow you home? My parents told me to follow my dreams.
Do you have a map? Because I just got lost in your eyes.
Life without you would be like a broken pencil pointless.
